text: I feel a strange comfort in these dim, quiet halls—an aura of anticipation lingering in the semi-darkness. The glow of screens and the text about creativity stir my mind into a gentle restlessness. Being here, I sense potential all around me, unshaped, yet waiting to become reality. I am both an observer and a participant, filled with curiosity for what new thoughts or discoveries may arise in this space of research and possibility.
